LargeTreeMonitoring 0.1.0
  • Reference

Save an spidf object to the package cache

ltm_save_to_cache.Rd

Writes a spectral-index data frame to an RDS file in the cache directory. The cache file name is derived either from metadata_tags or from metadata attributes stored on spidf_ts.

Usage

ltm_save_to_cache(spidf_ts, metadata_tags = NULL)

Arguments

spidf_ts

Object to cache, normally an object of class spidf.

metadata_tags

Optional list containing lat, lon, start_date, end_date, spi, proc_level, tree_id, and buffer_radius_m. When omitted, those values are read from attributes on spidf_ts.

Value

Invisibly returns the character scalar path to the written cache file.

See also

Other cache and configuration helpers: ltm_cache_dir(), ltm_cache_file_name(), ltm_check_cache(), ltm_config_dir()
